name: road-trip-runner
description: Road Trip Arcade mobile game collection.

scripts.app:sync:android: npm run app:prepare && cap sync android
scripts.app:sync:ios: npm run app:prepare && cap sync ios
scripts.app:android: npm run app:sync:android && cap open android
scripts.app:ios: npm run app:sync:ios && cap open ios
scripts.app:build:android: npm run app:sync:android && cd android && JAVA_HOME=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.app:install:android: npm run app:sync:android && cd android && JAVA_HOME=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home ./gradlew installDebug
scripts.app:build:ios: npm run app:sync:ios && xcodebuild -workspace ios/App/App.xcworkspace -scheme App -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -derivedDataPath /tmp/road-trip-arcade-ios-build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
scripts.app:archive:ios: npm run app:sync:ios && xcodebuild -workspace ios/App/App.xcworkspace -scheme App -configuration Release -destination 'generic/platform=iOS' -archivePath /tmp/RoadTripArcade.xcarchive archive
scripts.app:run:ios: npm run app:sync:ios && cap run ios
